transcript.text: I've been living in Boulder V-Log for the, what day is it today? The 17th of November 2013.
Today I got up at like 10 o'clock. I slept really well last night because I was kind of tired
Because I was riding the rollers and trainers and stuff yesterday. I got up and then I had
Breakfast and I answered a bunch of stuff on email and on YouTube and by the time I got going it was
Like 1130 but I was riding on the trainers there and working on this fucking thing, my
Kindle book, condensing pages, condensing those things to make them come down because they
Look double spaced when you're on the website. I was doing this one thing, I was doing it
All day yesterday and then I did it all day today too but I was riding the bike so it was
Cool. I was multitasking, you know, it was awesome. Like now the idea of just sitting in my fucking
Couch and like working on the computer and not riding on the trainers like I was doing
All summer in Lafayette is like completely beyond comprehension. I would never do that
Now. It's insane. That's insanity. Why the fuck? But you know, I'm living in a more balanced
Lifestyle. I'm like, you know, in a nice looking apartment. Everything's peaceful and so I,
You know, I'm not in a rush to like get ahead on that and so it's all, it's all perfect and
I, you know, I'm just as productive like that anyway so it's great and I have these like
Noise, these noise cancellation earphones so when I'm working away, I can't hear the
Bike going in the background. I can totally hear what I'm listening to. Today I was listening
To like Lives of the 12 Seriesers and stuff because I was going to do a video about it
And I'm going to, I did a video about it and I'll finish it tomorrow but I, anyways, having
Those noise cancellation earphones and working on my, my thing and on the computer and listening
To it and everything, it kind of takes my mind off of riding it and all the pain, like
Maybe the tiredness you would feel or leg pain or whatever from riding it, it just gets drowned
Out in the background and it just, it's great. It's a great way to get in shape and to, and
Whenever my butt gets sore, I can stand up and then I pedal really hard and my legs burn
A little bit and then I sit down again so I, it's like natural intervals and it's perfect,
Dude. It's multitasking. It's triple task. Riding on the bike, listening to the audio book
And working on the website all at the same time. It's fucking awesome. Anyways, that's
What I was doing all day. But, you know, I noticed that today my appetite actually kicked
Into gear today, which is about the round time. I predicted my appetite would kick into
Gear on the 21st, 17th and yeah, cause I had to, cause normally I would, cause I had, I
Had my big breakfast, you know, like my, uh, my scoop of oatmeal and my, my can of fruit
And then my, uh, my scoop of, uh, protein powder. I'll have another one now, but you know,
I had that I had for breakfast and then like two hours later I was hungry again. So I went
Into the supermarket and I got, I got, uh, I got a, a pizza, a big old pizza and I ate
The entire pizza. It was a big thick pizza too. And I put my little plant, I replanted
My plant in that planter.
